title: Unisolate Endpoint - Cybereason
content:
This playbook unisolates a machine based on the hostname provided.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cybereason pack (Cybereason, partner-supported).

Inputs — Hostname: The hostname of the endpoint to unisolate using Cybereason..

Integrations/scripts used: IsIntegrationAvailable, cybereason-unisolate-machine.
